description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by a rectangular yard enclosed with hedges and wooden fencing. The structure features a mix of white, beige, and blue exterior walls, with large windows and sliding glass doors providing ample natural light. A driveway leads to a covered carport on one side, while a small detached shed and a single tree are situated in the backyard. The front yard is landscaped with low shrubs and a pathway leading to the main entrance. The building appears to have a single story with a partial second-level section, and the overall design emphasizes clean lines and open spaces. The property includes both paved and green areas, blending urban and residential elements.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with white, beige, and blue walls, large windows, a carport, and landscaped yard enclosed by hedges and fencing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport, driveway, and landscaped front yard with hedges and a wooden fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, driveway, and the length of the building with visible fencing and hedges.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a tree, detached shed, and the back facade of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the backyard, shed, tree, and the transition between the fenced and hedged boundaries.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
